model.transformation.rpt_results.name: rpt_results
model.transformation.rpt_results.description: Table de reporting dénormalisée des résultats olympiques. Seule couche exposée à Superset.
model.transformation.rpt_results.rawCode:
with results as (
    select * from {{ ref('fct_results') }}
),

athletes as (
    select * from {{ ref('dim_athletes') }}
),

competitions as (
    select * from {{ ref('dim_competitions') }}
),

final as (
    select
        r.result_id,
        -- Athlète
        a.athlete_id,
        a.full_name                 as athlete_name,
        a.first_name,
        a.last_name,
        a.country_code,
        a.country_name,
        a.gender,
        a.age,
        a.sport_name,
        a.discipline,
        a.sport_category,
        -- Compétition
        c.competition_id,
        c.competition_name,
        c.edition,
        c.year,
        c.season,
        c.city,
        c.country                   as host_country,
        -- Résultat
        r.rank,
        r.medal,
        r.performance_value,
        r.performance_unit,
        r.is_medalist,
        r.medal_points
    from results r
    left join athletes    a on r.athlete_id    = a.athlete_id
    left join competitions c on r.competition_id = c.competition_id
)

select * from final
model.transformation.rpt_results.compiledCode:

        -- Compétition

        c.competition_name,
        c.edition,

        c.season,
        c.city,
        c.country                   as host_country,
        -- Résultat

        r.performance_value,
        r.performance_unit,
        r.is_medalist,
        r.medal_points
    from results r
    left join athletes    a on r.athlete_id    = a.athlete_id
    left join competitions c on r.competition_id = c.competition_id
)

select * from final

performance_unit.description: Unité de mesure de la performance

is_medalist.description: True si l'athlète a gagné une médaille

medal_points.description: Points de médaille (Or=3, Argent=2, Bronze=1, Aucun=0)

model.transformation.fct_results.name: fct_results
model.transformation.fct_results.description: Table de faits des résultats au grain résultat/athlète/compétition. Ne référence que le staging.
model.transformation.fct_results.rawCode:
with results as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_results') }}
),

final as (
    select
        result_id,
        athlete_id,
        competition_id,
        rank,
        medal,
        performance_value,
        performance_unit,
        -- Indicateurs calculés
        case when medal != 'None' then true else false end as is_medalist,
        case when medal = 'Gold'   then 3
             when medal = 'Silver' then 2
             when medal = 'Bronze' then 1
             else 0
        end                                                as medal_points
    from results
)

select * from final
model.transformation.fct_results.compiledCode:
with results as (
    select * from "edna-sports-data"."main_staging"."stg_results"
),

final as (
    select
        result_id,
        athlete_id,
        competition_id,
        rank,
        medal,
        performance_value,
        performance_unit,
        -- Indicateurs calculés
        case when medal != 'None' then true else false end as is_medalist,
        case when medal = 'Gold'   then 3
             when medal = 'Silver' then 2
             when medal = 'Bronze' then 1
             else 0
        end                                                as medal_points
    from results
)

select * from final

model.transformation.dim_athletes.name: dim_athletes
model.transformation.dim_athletes.description: Table de dimension des athlètes enrichie avec les informations du sport.
model.transformation.dim_athletes.rawCode:
with athletes as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_athletes') }}
),

sports as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_sports') }}
),

final as (
    select
        a.athlete_id,
        a.first_name || ' ' || a.last_name   as full_name,
        a.first_name,
        a.last_name,
        a.country_code,
        a.country_name,
        a.birth_year,
        2024 - a.birth_year                  as age,
        a.gender,
        s.sport_name,
        s.discipline,
        s.sport_category
    from athletes a
    left join sports s on a.sport_id = s.sport_id
)

select * from final
model.transformation.dim_athletes.compiledCode:
with athletes as (
    select * from "edna-sports-data"."main_staging"."stg_athletes"
),

sports as (
    select * from "edna-sports-data"."main_staging"."stg_sports"
),

final as (
    select
        a.athlete_id,
        a.first_name || ' ' || a.last_name   as full_name,
        a.first_name,
        a.last_name,
        a.country_code,
        a.country_name,
        a.birth_year,
        2024 - a.birth_year                  as age,
        a.gender,
        s.sport_name,
        s.discipline,
        s.sport_category
    from athletes a
    left join sports s on a.sport_id = s.sport_id
)

select * from final

model.transformation.stg_athletes.name: stg_athletes
model.transformation.stg_athletes.description: Athlètes olympiques et leurs informations personnelles.
model.transformation.stg_athletes.rawCode:
with source as (
    select * from read_parquet('../processed-resources/athletes/*.parquet')
),

renamed as (
    select
        athlete_id,
        first_name,
        last_name,
        country_code,
        country_name,
        birth_year,
        gender,
        sport_id
    from source
)

select * from renamed
